ip_outcome_note: Visual match confirmed: pig-like creature with coiled spring tail and pearl on head matches National Pokedex no. 325 exactly. PokemonTCG.io API xy10-30 confirms name, types, and artist.

trivia_bullets.text: Spoink is a Psychic-type common in Fates Collide (XY10, May 2016). It is a Generation III (Hoenn) Pokemon making an XY-era appearance; the set draws Pokemon across multiple generations into a psychic-themed roster.

Spoink's Ruby Pokedex entry: 'Spoink bounces around on its tail. The shock of its bouncing makes its heart pump. As a result, this Pokemon cannot afford to stop bouncing — if it stops, its heart will stop.' One of the most frequently cited examples of franchise-dark Pokedex lore: knocking out a Spoink in battle is effectively killing it, and it must bounce even during sleep.
sources: WebSearch: Kotaku 'Spoink Will Die If It Ever Stops Bouncing'

trivia_bullets.text: "It bounces around on its tail to keep its heart pumping. It carries a pearl from Clamperl on its head." — The pearl connects Spoink to Clamperl (National Pokedex no. 366); a larger pearl amplifies Spoink's psychic power.
Art credited to TOKIYA, a Pokemon TCG illustrator active across the XY era, known for dynamic action-pose compositions.

related_cards.name: Grumpig
related_cards.note: Spoink's evolution; trades spring tail for direct psychic projection

related_cards.name: Clamperl
related_cards.note: Source of the pearl on Spoink's head per Pokedex lore

related_cards.name: Solosis
related_cards.note: Fellow Psychic common in the same set; embryo-in-bubble counterpart to Spoink's bouncing existentialism
